name: Apple Breakfast Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and baking powder; add salt and brown sugar.
2. Cut in shortening until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Add raisins to the mixture.
4. Gradually add milk and beaten egg, stirring until a stiff dough forms.
5. Pour into an oiled shallow pan.
6. Brush the top of the bread with melted butter.
7. Core, quarter, and thinly slice apples.
8. Arrange slices in rows over the dough, overlapping edges slightly.
9. Brush apples with additional melted butter.
10. Sprinkle with cinnamon and brown sugar mixture.
11. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes or until apples are tender.
